hero_subtitle: SFTY helps executives gain clear visibility into compliance workflows by connecting provider outputs, regulatory rules, cases and audit evidence into one scalable risk control platform.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive oversight fades across compliance workflows
problem_description: Leadership teams lack a unified view of compliance and risk operations, causing gaps in decision visibility and audit readiness. Disconnected provider outputs and manual processes slow risk evaluation and complicate bank due diligence for digital asset businesses.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates provider outputs, regulatory rule updates, case decisions and audit evidence into a single platform so leadership can monitor compliance and risk with clarity and defensible oversight.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to enterprise risk control
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates provider data, applies internal policies, routes cases, and preserves evidence to deliver clear risk insights and audit-ready compliance oversight.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: More than monitoring. Executive risk visibility
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral layer that connects compliance outputs into clear, auditable workflows, cases and evidence for enterprise risk control and leadership oversight.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP leadership with a connected compliance layer that supports provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and scalable deployment for stronger risk oversight.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY provide executive risk visibility and audit readiness
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance workflows support enterprise risk control
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit evidence preserves decision traceability for reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY supports scalable compliance orchestration for VASPs
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP executives with a connected compliance control layer that consolidates workflows, risk signals, regulatory rules, cases and reports for clearer operational oversight and risk management.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY improve compliance visibility?
faq_2_answer: SFTY connects provider outputs and internal policies into structured workflows, enabling executives to monitor risk, compliance decisions and regulatory changes from one operational dashboard in real time.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case histories, decision logs and supporting evidence to support audit readiness and facilitates compliance reviews with a traceable, structured record of operational decisions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance tools?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY integrates seamlessly with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, sitting above them to connect outputs without disrupting established compliance systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYT or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY does not replace these providers; instead, it aggregates and structures their outputs into coherent workflows, supporting human review and reporting workflows.
final_title: Gain enterprise visibility across compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs, regulatory updates, cases and evidence into one scalable compliance control layer.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
